name: Southern Hills Golf & Country Club
notes: LOCATION MISMATCH: Southern Hills Golf & Country Club is NOT in Hua Hin — it is located in Ban Phru, Hat Yai, Songkhla Province in the far south of Thailand, near the Malaysian border. Address: 128 Moo 8, Kanchanavanich Road, Ban Pru, Hat Yai, Songkhla 90110. GPS: 6.898000, 100.503348. Approximately 950 km from Bangkok (12+ hours drive) and ~300 km south-southeast of Phuket. It was listed in the pipeline as a Hua Hin course (#11) — this is a significant geographic error; Hat Yai / Songkhla is entirely different region from Hua Hin. Designed by Perry Dye (Perry O. Dye), opened 1999. Course length: 7,045 yards (Black/Men's), 6,081 yards (Club), 5,051 yards (Red/Women's). Bermuda 419 greens, Tifdwarf fairways. Green fees: 1golf.eu lists weekday 950 THB, weekend/holidays 1,400 THB; another source cited all-in package of 1,700 THB including caddy and cart. Caddies are mandatory for all players. Separate fax: +66 74 553 684. Night golf available. Metal spikes not permitted. Excellent reputation for a challenging world-class course in an unusual location. Alternative phone seen in sources: +66 99 376 7886 and 081-898-3025.
